title: Everything We Know About The Great Beyond, Starring Jenna Ortega And Glen Powell
dek: J.J. Abrams' next mystery-box movie pairs two of young Hollywood's biggest names as a newlywed couple whose world turns out to be a lot more literal than they thought.

items.heading: A bestselling fantasy author discovers the world he invented is actually real
items.text: Glen Powell plays a hugely successful fantasy novelist — described as being in the mold of Stephen King — whose bestselling series turns out to be based on a real, mythical world. The story follows him and his new wife as they're pulled into that world and forced to find a way back home.

items.heading: Jenna Ortega plays his newlywed wife, caught in the middle of it
items.text: Ortega plays one half of a young married couple alongside Powell's character, with early descriptions of the film centering the two of them fighting to survive a supernatural entity connected to his fictional universe.

items.heading: It's directed by J.J. Abrams, who's kept almost everything about it under wraps
items.text: True to Abrams' long-running "mystery box" approach to marketing — the same strategy he used on Cloverfield and Super 8 — plot details for The Great Beyond stayed almost entirely secret for most of production, with only the title, cast, and a bare-bones synopsis confirmed for months.

items.heading: The supporting cast is stacked
items.text: Alongside Powell and Ortega, the film features Emma Mackey, Sophie Okonedo, Merritt Wever, and Samuel L. Jackson in supporting roles for Warner Bros.

items.heading: It hits theaters November 13, 2026
items.text: Production wrapped and post-production was completed earlier this year, and Warner Bros. has set the film for a wide theatrical release on November 13, 2026 — putting Ortega and Powell's first film together directly in the middle of the fall movie season.

sources.title: J.J. Abrams' Mysterious Film THE GREAT BEYOND Sets November 2026 Release Date — Nerdist
